# Leonardo Esparis
> Software engineer specialising in high-concurrency, event-driven systems.

## About
- 4+ years building reliable, event-driven infrastructure in Python and Django
- Hexagonal architecture and domain-driven design practitioner
- Interests: distributed systems, event sourcing, side projects, learning new languages

## Stack
Python, Django, FastAPI, Kafka, RabbitMQ, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker
